privileged_info_summary: The schedule_activity task operates on synthetic test data. The opportunity 'CloudServices Partnership' from 'Vertex Solutions Corp' uses realistic company and domain names (vertex-solutions.com is a real company), but the phone number +1 (312) 555-0456 uses the 555 exchange, which is reserved for fictional and test use in the North American Numbering Plan (NANP). The email partnerships@vertex-solutions.com cannot be verified to exist. Expected revenue is $120,000. Two discrepancies exist in the codebase: (1) Probability differs between seed_crm.py (30%) and setup_task.sh (40%), and (2) Description text differs between seed_crm.py (full version with Q2 timeline details) and setup_task.sh (shorter version). The task requires scheduling a 'Phone Call' activity with summary 'Follow-up call regarding Q2 proposal' and due date set to tomorrow.
